mapper.select:
/* idntMgmtMapper.getCusInfoByTelnum */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SUBSCRIBER_NO_MSK , '00' AS SEARCH_GB , C.CUSTOMER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0009', C.CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS CUSTOMER_TYPE_NM , ( CASE WHEN C.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' THEN C.CUSTOMER_SSN ELSE C.TAX_ID END ) AS USER_SSN , ( CASE WHEN C.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' THEN C.CUSTOMER_SSN ELSE C.TAX_ID END ) AS USER_SSN_MSK , ( CASE WHEN RNUM < CNT THEN 'C' ELSE B.SUB_STATUS END ) AS SUB_STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM ('MSP0003', ( CASE WHEN RNUM >= CNT THEN B.SUB_STATUS ELSE 'C' END )) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , C.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM , C.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM_MSK , B.PPPO , DECODE(B.PPPO, 'PO', '후불', '선불') AS PPPO_NM , D.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || D.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS CSTMR_ADDR , D.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || D.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS CSTMR_ADDR_MSK , ( CASE WHEN RNUM = 1 OR (A.OPEN_DT = B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SVC_CNTR_NO) THEN B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ELSE A.EVNT_DT END ) AS OPEN_DT , ( CASE WHEN B.SUB_STATUS = 'C' THEN SUBSTR(B.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) WHEN RNUM = A.CNT THEN DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'C', SUBSTR(B.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), '') ELSE LEAD(EVNT_DT) OVER(ORDER BY RNUM) END ) AS TMNT_DT , A.CUSTOMER_ID , B.TRNS_YN
, #{reqType} AS REQ_TYPE , #{invstType} AS INVST_TYPE , #{invstNm} AS INVST_NM , #{invstLoc} AS INVST_LOC , #{invstVal} AS INVST_VAL , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0108' AND CD_VAL = #{reqType}) AS REQ_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0107' AND CD_VAL = #{invstType}) AS INVST_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9020' AND CD_VAL = #{invstLoc}) AS INVST_LOC_NM , #{reqOdty} AS REQ_ODTY , #{reqUser} AS REQ_USER , #{appOdty} AS APP_ODTY
, #{appOdtyNm} AS APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0112' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0111' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
, #{appUser} AS APP_USER , #{reqRsn} AS REQ_RSN , #{reqDttm} AS REQ_DTTM
FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , A.* FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.CUSTOMER_ID , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , MAX(SUBSTR(A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, 1, 8)) AS EVNT_DT , COUNT(1) OVER() AS CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{searchVal} AND ( A.EVNT_CD IN ( 'NAC', 'CAN' ) /* 번호변경후 해지적용 */ OR ( A.EVNT_CD = 'MCN' AND A.SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD = 'MCN' ) /* 명변 */ OR ( A.EVNT_CD = 'CCN' AND A.SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD = 'CCN' ) /* 번변 */ OR ( A.EVNT_CD IN ( 'UPD', 'UPS' ) AND A.SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD = 'NAC' ) ) /* UPD 개통 */ AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, B.CUSTOMER_ID, A.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ORDER BY EVNT_DT ) A ) A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO C , MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO D WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.BAN = D.BAN ORDER BY A.RNUM

/* idntMgmtMapper.getCusInfoByIdntNo */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SUBSCRIBER_NO_MSK , #{searchGb} AS SEARCH_GB , B.CUSTOMER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0009', B.CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS CUSTOMER_TYPE_NM , DECODE(#{searchGb}, '02', B.TAX_ID, '03', B.DRIVR_LICNS_NO, B.CUSTOMER_SSN) AS USER_SSN , DECODE(#{searchGb}, '02', B.TAX_ID, '03', B.DRIVR_LICNS_NO, B.CUSTOMER_SSN) AS USER_SSN_MSK , A.SUB_STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', A.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM_MSK , A.PPPO , DECODE(A.PPPO, 'PO', '후불', '선불') AS PPPO_NM , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'C' , SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1 , 8), '') AS TMNT_DT , DECODE(C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, NULL, '', C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || C.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN) AS CSTMR_ADDR , DECODE(C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, NULL, '', C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || C.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN) AS CSTMR_ADDR_MSK , B.CUSTOMER_ID , A.TRNS_YN
, #{reqType} AS REQ_TYPE , #{invstType} AS INVST_TYPE , #{invstNm} AS INVST_NM , #{invstLoc} AS INVST_LOC , #{invstVal} AS INVST_VAL , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0108' AND CD_VAL = #{reqType}) AS REQ_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0107' AND CD_VAL = #{invstType}) AS INVST_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9020' AND CD_VAL = #{invstLoc}) AS INVST_LOC_NM , #{reqOdty} AS REQ_ODTY , #{reqUser} AS REQ_USER , #{appOdty} AS APP_ODTY
, #{appOdtyNm} AS APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0112' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0111' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
, #{appUser} AS APP_USER , #{reqRsn} AS REQ_RSN , #{reqDttm} AS REQ_DTTM
FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID , DRIVR_LICNS_NO , TAX_ID , CUSTOMER_SSN , CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD NOT IN ( '02', '03' ) AND CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD = #{searchGb} AND CUSTOMER_SSN = #{searchVal} ) B, MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO C WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.BAN = C.BAN ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_NUM DESC

/* idntMgmtMapper.getCusInfoByTaxNo */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SUBSCRIBER_NO_MSK , #{searchGb} AS SEARCH_GB , B.CUSTOMER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0009', B.CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS CUSTOMER_TYPE_NM , DECODE(#{searchGb}, '02', B.TAX_ID, '03', B.DRIVR_LICNS_NO, B.CUSTOMER_SSN) AS USER_SSN , DECODE(#{searchGb}, '02', B.TAX_ID, '03', B.DRIVR_LICNS_NO, B.CUSTOMER_SSN) AS USER_SSN_MSK , A.SUB_STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', A.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM_MSK , A.PPPO , DECODE(A.PPPO, 'PO', '후불', '선불') AS PPPO_NM , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'C' , SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1 , 8), '') AS TMNT_DT , DECODE(C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, NULL, '', C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || C.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN) AS CSTMR_ADDR , DECODE(C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, NULL, '', C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || C.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN) AS CSTMR_ADDR_MSK , B.CUSTOMER_ID , A.TRNS_YN
, #{reqType} AS REQ_TYPE , #{invstType} AS INVST_TYPE , #{invstNm} AS INVST_NM , #{invstLoc} AS INVST_LOC , #{invstVal} AS INVST_VAL , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0108' AND CD_VAL = #{reqType}) AS REQ_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0107' AND CD_VAL = #{invstType}) AS INVST_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9020' AND CD_VAL = #{invstLoc}) AS INVST_LOC_NM , #{reqOdty} AS REQ_ODTY , #{reqUser} AS REQ_USER , #{appOdty} AS APP_ODTY
, #{appOdtyNm} AS APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0112' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0111' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
, #{appUser} AS APP_USER , #{reqRsn} AS REQ_RSN , #{reqDttm} AS REQ_DTTM
FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID , DRIVR_LICNS_NO , TAX_ID , CUSTOMER_SSN , CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD = #{searchGb} AND TAX_ID = #{searchVal} ) B, MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO C WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.BAN = C.BAN ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_NUM DESC

/* idntMgmtMapper.getCusInfoByDriNo */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SUBSCRIBER_NO_MSK , #{searchGb} AS SEARCH_GB , B.CUSTOMER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0009', B.CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS CUSTOMER_TYPE_NM , DECODE(#{searchGb}, '02', B.TAX_ID, '03', B.DRIVR_LICNS_NO, B.CUSTOMER_SSN) AS USER_SSN , DECODE(#{searchGb}, '02', B.TAX_ID, '03', B.DRIVR_LICNS_NO, B.CUSTOMER_SSN) AS USER_SSN_MSK , A.SUB_STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', A.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM_MSK , A.PPPO , DECODE(A.PPPO, 'PO', '후불', '선불') AS PPPO_NM , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'C' , SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1 , 8), '') AS TMNT_DT , DECODE(C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, NULL, '', C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || C.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN) AS CSTMR_ADDR , DECODE(C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, NULL, '', C.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || C.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN) AS CSTMR_ADDR_MSK , B.CUSTOMER_ID , A.TRNS_YN
, #{reqType} AS REQ_TYPE , #{invstType} AS INVST_TYPE , #{invstNm} AS INVST_NM , #{invstLoc} AS INVST_LOC , #{invstVal} AS INVST_VAL , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0108' AND CD_VAL = #{reqType}) AS REQ_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0107' AND CD_VAL = #{invstType}) AS INVST_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9020' AND CD_VAL = #{invstLoc}) AS INVST_LOC_NM , #{reqOdty} AS REQ_ODTY , #{reqUser} AS REQ_USER , #{appOdty} AS APP_ODTY
, #{appOdtyNm} AS APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0112' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0111' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
, #{appUser} AS APP_USER , #{reqRsn} AS REQ_RSN , #{reqDttm} AS REQ_DTTM
FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, ( /* 법인번호 조회 */ SELECT CUSTOMER_ID , DRIVR_LICNS_NO , TAX_ID , CUSTOMER_SSN , CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'B' AND DRIVR_LICNS_NO = #{searchVal} ) B, MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO C WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.BAN = C.BAN ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_NUM DESC

/* idntMgmtMapper.getCusInfoByContractNum */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SUBSCRIBER_NO_MSK , #{searchGb} AS SEARCH_GB , C.CUSTOMER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0009', C.CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS CUSTOMER_TYPE_NM , ( CASE WHEN C.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' THEN C.CUSTOMER_SSN ELSE C.TAX_ID END ) AS USER_SSN , ( CASE WHEN C.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' THEN C.CUSTOMER_SSN ELSE C.TAX_ID END ) AS USER_SSN_MSK , ( CASE WHEN RNUM < CNT THEN 'C' ELSE B.SUB_STATUS END ) AS SUB_STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM ('MSP0003', ( CASE WHEN RNUM >= CNT THEN B.SUB_STATUS ELSE 'C' END )) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , C.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM , C.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM_MSK , B.PPPO , DECODE(B.PPPO, 'PO', '후불', '선불') AS PPPO_NM , D.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || D.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS CSTMR_ADDR , D.BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN || ' ' || D.BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS CSTMR_ADDR_MSK , ( CASE WHEN RNUM = 1 OR (A.OPEN_DT = B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SVC_CNTR_NO) THEN B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ELSE A.EVNT_DT END ) AS OPEN_DT , ( CASE WHEN B.SUB_STATUS = 'C' THEN SUBSTR(B.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) WHEN RNUM = A.CNT THEN DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'C', SUBSTR(B.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), '') ELSE LEAD(EVNT_DT) OVER(ORDER BY RNUM) END ) AS TMNT_DT , A.CUSTOMER_ID , B.TRNS_YN
, #{reqType} AS REQ_TYPE , #{invstType} AS INVST_TYPE , #{invstNm} AS INVST_NM , #{invstLoc} AS INVST_LOC , #{invstVal} AS INVST_VAL , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0108' AND CD_VAL = #{reqType}) AS REQ_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0107' AND CD_VAL = #{invstType}) AS INVST_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9020' AND CD_VAL = #{invstLoc}) AS INVST_LOC_NM , #{reqOdty} AS REQ_ODTY , #{reqUser} AS REQ_USER , #{appOdty} AS APP_ODTY
, #{appOdtyNm} AS APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0112' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0111' AND CD_VAL = #{appOdty} ) as APP_ODTY_NM
, #{appUser} AS APP_USER , #{reqRsn} AS REQ_RSN , #{reqDttm} AS REQ_DTTM
FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , A.* FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.CUSTOMER_ID , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , MAX(SUBSTR(A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, 1, 8)) AS EVNT_DT , COUNT(1) OVER() AS CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal} AND ( A.EVNT_CD IN ( 'NAC', 'CAN' ) /* 번호변경후 해지적용 */ OR ( A.EVNT_CD = 'MCN' AND A.SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD = 'MCN' ) /* 명변 */ OR ( A.EVNT_CD = 'CCN' AND A.SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD = 'CCN' ) /* 번변 */ OR ( A.EVNT_CD IN ( 'UPD', 'UPS' ) AND A.SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD = 'NAC' ) ) /* UPD 개통 */ AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, B.CUSTOMER_ID, A.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ORDER BY EVNT_DT ) A ) A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO C , MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO D WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.BAN = D.BAN ORDER BY A.RNUM

/* idntMgmtMapper.getInvstCusInfoDtl */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SUBSCRIBER_NO_MSK, (select CD_DSC from cmn_grp_cd_mst where grp_id = 'MSP0005' and CD_VAL = EVNT_CD) as EVNT_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS' ), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS EVNT_CHANGE_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND SUBSCRIBER_NO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY EVNT_CHANGE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: /*idntMgmtMapper.savMspInvstReqHist */ INSERT INTO MSP_INVST_REQ_HIST ( SEQ_NUM , SEARCH_TYPE , CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , CSTMR_NM , CUSTOMER_TYPE , USER_SSN , SUB_STATUS , PPPO , OPEN_DT , TMNT_DT , CSTMR_ADDR , INVST_VAL , INVST_TYPE , INVST_NM , REQ_TYPE , PROCR_ID , PROC_DT , REGST_DTTM , CUSTOMER_ID , INVST_LOC , REQ_ODTY , REQ_USER , APP_ODTY , APP_ODTY_NM , APP_USER , REQ_RSN , REQ_DTTM , EMAIL , DEL_USER , DEL_DTTM ) SELECT SEQ_NUM , SEARCH_TYPE , CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , CSTMR_NM , CUSTOMER_TYPE , USER_SSN , SUB_STATUS , PPPO , OPEN_DT , TMNT_DT , CSTMR_ADDR , INVST_VAL , INVST_TYPE , INVST_NM , REQ_TYPE , PROCR_ID , PROC_DT , REGST_DTTM , CUSTOMER_ID , INVST_LOC , REQ_ODTY , REQ_USER , APP_ODTY , APP_ODTY_NM , APP_USER , REQ_RSN , REQ_DTTM , EMAIL , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE FROM MSP_INVST_REQ_MST WHERE SEQ_NUM = #{seqNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
